name: paypal_payment_integrity
description: Business integrity rules for PayPal payment processing API — covers all 9 Axiom rule types

rules.description: Timestamp — expected to vary per request; non-semantic for behavioral comparison
PayPal transaction fee must always be returned in payment responses
ISO 4217 currency code required on all monetary responses
Internal error codes must not appear in payment API responses (data leakage)
Payment status must be a recognised FSM state — undocumented states break downstream processors
Currency must be uppercase ISO 4217 — SWIFT and forex routing is case-sensitive
fraud_score above 0.35 triggers mandatory manual review — silent pass is a compliance breach
Low-risk transactions must carry APPROVE decision — REVIEW requires an explicit escalation path
Amounts must not drift beyond sub-cent precision — float bug guard for reconciliation
A COMPLETED payment must always carry a positive net_amount (settlement integrity)
